hero.eyebrow: The #1 platform to manage 3D Printing businesses
hero.subtitle: Precise quotes, automated inventory, and professional client management — All in one dashboard to scale your production.

pas.label: The Problem
pas.title:
3D printing is amazing.
Managing the business? Not so much.
pas.subtitle: If you deal with offhand quotes, filaments that run out mid-print, and files lost in messages, we understand your pain.

p1.title: "By Eye" Pricing
p1.desc: Charging only for "print time" ignores energy costs, failures, and post-processing. Result? Working hard for little gain.

p2.title: Inventory Chaos
p2.desc: Finding out material ran out mid-way through a 20-hour piece is frustrating. Another print to the trash.

p3.title: Lost Orders
p3.desc: Messages on Instagram, WhatsApp, and Email. You spend more time organizing files than producing.

solution.title: Our Solution.
solution.desc: was built from scratch to transform your hobby into a highly profitable, predictable, and stress-free production process.

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: A complete ecosystem for your business

health.title: Business Health Score
health.desc: Intelligent analysis of your business health based on margins, stock, and deliveries.

calc.title: Cost Calculator
calc.desc: Precise formulas that consider light, amortization, material, and failures.

materials.title: Material Management
materials.desc: Real-time inventory with automatic low-stock warnings.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.desc: Complete visual pipeline, from initial quote to shipping.

finance.title: Financial Reports
finance.desc: Visualize revenue and net profit clearly and objectively.

printers.title: Printer Management
printers.desc: Monitor the productivity and maintenance of your machines.

branding.title: Customization
branding.desc: Interface and documents with your logo and corporate colors.

backoffice.title: Backoffice and Backup
backoffice.desc: Your data exportable in CSV and guaranteed daily backups.

pricing.title: Transparent Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your business stage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to test?
faq.a1: No. Our 14-day trial is completely free and requires no payment data to start.
faq.a2: Yes, we use state-of-the-art encryption and data isolation (RLS) via Supabase to ensure that only you access your information.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Absolutely. There are no lock-in contracts. You can cancel your subscription directly in the settings at any time.
faq.a4: We offer priority support via WhatsApp and Email for all paid plans, and complete documentation for all users.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage profile, brand, preferences, and team

brand.logo_hint: PNG or JPG, max 512KB. Appears in sidebar and on receipts.
brand.sig_hint: PNG with transparent background, max 512KB. Appears on receipts.

prefs.lang_hint: Interface translation will be available soon.

notifs.stock_out_desc: Notifies when a material reach zero
notifs.stock_low_desc: Notifies when stock is below threshold
notifs.overdue_desc: Shows alert on dashboard for overdue orders

sub_banner.trial_desc: All features unlocked. Choose a plan before the trial ends.

health.title: ⚡ Business Health
health.tip: Add a due date to orders to help the score detect delays and protect your reputation.

insights.margin_warn1: Estimated margin {m}% — consider adjusting material prices.
insights.margin_warn2: Estimated margin {m}% — pay attention to production costs.
insights.margin_bad: Estimated margin {m}% — urgently review your pricing strategy.
insights.late_ok: No overdue orders. Excellent delivery pace!
insights.late_warn1: 1 order potentially overdue — check delivery dates.
insights.late_warnN: {n} overdue orders — your clients might be waiting.
insights.late_badN: {n} overdue orders — high risk to business reputation.
insights.late_none: No open orders. Ready for new jobs!
insights.stock_ok: Filament stock is in good order.
insights.stock_warnN: {n} filament(s) running low — restock before taking new orders.
insights.stock_badN: {n} filaments on alert — risk of failing to fulfil orders.
insights.pay_ok_all: All orders this month are paid.
insights.pay_ok_some: {p}% of orders pending payment — within normal range.
insights.pay_warn: {p}% of orders with no payment received — follow up with clients.
insights.pay_bad: Over half of orders are unpaid — cash flow at risk.
insights.rev_stable: Revenue stable compared to last month.
insights.rev_warn: Revenue {p}% compared to last month — weaker month.
insights.rev_bad: Revenue {p}% compared to last month — check your pipeline.
